commentary:
Day ahead and intraday power prices in January were characterised by strong renewable volatility, with wind starting off strong, and not fully recoveing until around the 21st Jan. DA prices traded roughly in the £75-£115 range, however intraday prices increased sharply on two occasions through cold/low wind spells. 

Northwold remained in SFFR due to strong clearing prices, ramping issues while in the dynamic services, and greater wholesale flexbility.
